page: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-24 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 24 dedicated vCPUs and 186 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 7.75 GB per core. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8581C x86_64 processor with 12 physical cores and 2 threads per core, it operates at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz. The CPU architecture includes a 260 MB L3 cache, 2 MB L2 cache, and 48 KB L1d cache, alongside advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix operations.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in specific workloads. The instance achieves a strong rating in Geekbench single-core performance, image processing, and text processing. Static web serving throughput is also strong at 40.6 GB/sec. For machine learning workloads, the server demonstrates top-tier performance in text generation for small LLM models at 394.04 tokens/sec, while maintaining average performance for larger models. Multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and memory bandwidth tests generally fall within the average tier.

This server does not include bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external storage configuration. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the c4-highmem-24 provides a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require dedicated GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for high-throughput web serving, text and image processing pipelines, in-memory databases, and lightweight language model inference.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-24 is a memory-optimized server instance configured with 24 dedicated vCPUs and 186 GB of RAM, powered by an Intel Xeon 8581C x86_64 processor. Operating at 2.3 GHz across 12 physical cores, the CPU features a 260 MB L3 cache and supports Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512. Benchmark results show strong performance in Geekbench single-core execution, image processing, text processing, and static web serving throughput, alongside top-tier text generation speeds for small language models. The instance does not include local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is optimized for memory-intensive applications, text and image processing pipelines, and in-memory database operations that benefit from a high memory-to-vCPU ratio without requiring dedicated GPU hardware.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processing, advanced matrix extensions, and high-throughput web serving capabilities.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8581C processor with 24 dedicated vCPUs and 186 GB RAM
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Strong performance in single-core benchmarks, image processing, and text processing
Top-tier text generation speeds for small-scale language model inference
No bundled local storage or complimentary public IPv4 addresses
Optimized for in-memory databases, web serving, and memory-intensive pipelines
